description: Geeky Orchestration plugin hooks — guard edits to frozen planning artifacts. Default mode is warn (advisory, surfaced via portable stdout+stderr). For a hard block, change the command to append --mode block (emits Claude/Codex deny JSON). Uses the Python hook by default for cross-platform reliability. To prefer PowerShell on Windows: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/guard-planning-contract.ps1" -Mode warn
